seo.title: Warm Decadent Chocolate Pudding - 6 Servings - Marinda Kook

html:
There are few things in life as forgiving as chocolate. This dessert is deliciously saucy.

  • 250 ml flour
  • 25 ml cocoa
  • 125 g margarine or butter
  • 200 ml milk
  • 15 ml baking powder
  • 1 egg
  • 200 ml sugar

SAUCE

  • 500 ml boiling water
  • 375 ml sugar
  • 20 ml cocoa

Mix the sauce until the sugar has dissolved . Use a wire whisk.

NOW:

  1. Melt margarine and milk together.
  2. Beat the egg and sugar until light in colour.
  3. Mix all the ingredients for the batter together.
  4. Pour the sauce into a greased oven dish. Spoon dollops of batter on top of the sauce.
  5. Bake for 30 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

Serve it with custard or ice cream.
